chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-343 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 24-03-2025 None present for the applicant. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional P.G. **** None present for the applicant; no intimation is received; same was the position on the last date of hearing, which shows that the applicant and his counsel have lost interest in proceeding of this application. Accordingly, instant Crl. Misc. Application is dismissed for non- prosecution. JUDGE Ahmad
